description: The settings page provides centralized management of all sensor toggles. Users can enable or disable various device sensors (location, health, notification listener, activity recognition, etc.) individually. This page itself does not collect any data; it serves as the control interface for sensor features. The specific data collection behavior of each sensor is described in its corresponding background service documentation.

data.detail: enable/disable settings per server for all device sensors

permissions.purpose: No runtime permissions are declared or requested by this screen itself. Sensor-specific permissions are handled by individual sensor managers.
